title: Update authentication credentials

requirements.text: Update the hardcoded authentication credentials in the backend to username 'Hexa's Beanibazar' and password 'Hexas@12345'
acceptanceCriteria: Backend authentication accepts username 'Hexa's Beanibazar' and password 'Hexas@12345'

requirements.text: Update the hardcoded authentication credentials in the frontend useAuth hook to username 'Hexa's Beanibazar' and password 'Hexas@12345' to match the backend
acceptanceCriteria: Frontend authentication hook uses username 'Hexa's Beanibazar' and password 'Hexas@12345'
Credentials match between frontend and backend for successful authentication

constraints: Maintain the existing session-based authentication mechanism
Do not modify the authentication flow logic, only update the credential values
